name: Cala MCP
tagline: Connect OpenClaw and Cursor to Cala's MCP for verified knowledge search.
description: This skill guides the agent to connect to Cala's Model Context Protocol (MCP). Once configured, the agent can use Cala's knowledge layer: natural-language knowledge search with sources, structured queries (e.g. startups by location and funding), and entity search by name or UUID. Setup requires a free API key from console.cala.ai and adding the Cala MCP server to your client config (e.g. ~/.cursor/mcp.json). Official documentation: https://docs.cala.ai/mcp.
